changes.value:
## What

Implement `TrackedStore<Item = Entity, ItemId = EntityId>` for the entity system. Replace entity's own changelog, undo stack, and flush logic with the store crate. Wire `StoreContext` into the dispatch layer. **Stop here and manually test do/undo/redo before proceeding.**

**Files to modify:**
- `swissarmyhammer-entity/Cargo.toml` — add dep on `swissarmyhammer-store`
- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/lib.rs` — add `EntityId(Ulid)` newtype, export it
- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/context.rs` — implement `TrackedStore`:
  - `type Item = Entity`
  - `type ItemId = EntityId`
  - `root()` → entity_types directory
  - `item_id(entity)` → `EntityId` from entity
  - `serialize(entity)` → MD+YAML frontmatter text
  - `deserialize(text)` → parse frontmatter+body into Entity
- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/undo_commands.rs` — `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` dispatch through `StoreContext` instead of `EntityContext::undo()`

**Files to delete:**
- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/undo_stack.rs` — moved to store crate
- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/changelog.rs` — replaced by store crate

**Files to modify in kanban-app:**
- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — replace `flush_and_emit_for_handle` with `store_context.flush_all()` + generic event emission loop
- `kanban-app/src/state.rs` — `AppState` holds `StoreContext`, registers entity `StoreHandle` on board open

**Approach:**

### EntityId newtype
```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash)]
pub struct EntityId(ulid::Ulid);
// Display, FromStr — delegate to Ulid
```

### TrackedStore impl
The serialize/deserialize methods must match the existing on-disk format exactly so existing boards load without migration:
- `serialize`: YAML frontmatter between `---` delimiters + markdown body (if body_field is set)
- `deserialize`: parse `---` delimiters, YAML frontmatter, markdown body

### Migration path for EntityContext
- `EntityContext` keeps its in-memory entity registry, field definitions, schema
- Write path: `EntityContext::write()` delegates to `StoreHandle::write()` instead of doing its own file I/O + changelog
- Delete path: `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to `StoreHandle::delete()`
- Undo/redo: removed from EntityContext, handled by StoreContext
- `push_undo_stack()`: removed, StoreHandle returns UndoEntryId, caller pushes to StoreContext

### Dispatch layer changes
- `dispatch_command_internal` gets access to `StoreContext` (on AppState)
- After undoable commands: `store_context.flush_all()` replaces `flush_and_emit_for_handle()`
- Emit each `ChangeEvent` from flush
- `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` call `store_context.undo()`/`redo()`
- UIState undo/redo flags synced from `store_context.can_undo()`/`can_redo()`

### Manual test checklist (do this before moving on)
1. Open existing board — all entities load correctly
2. Create a task — file appears on disk, changelog.jsonl entry logged
3. Edit a task field — changelog entry with before/after text
4. Cmd+Z — edit is undone, file reverts
5. Cmd+Shift+Z — edit is redone
6. Delete a task — Cmd+Z restores it
7. External file edit (e.g. vim) — flush detects change, UI updates
8. Multiple undo/redo in sequence
9. All existing tests pass

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `EntityId(Ulid)` newtype exported from entity crate
- [ ] `TrackedStore<Item=Entity, ItemId=EntityId>` implemented
- [ ] Entity serialize/deserialize matches existing on-disk format (no migration needed)
- [ ] `EntityContext::write()` delegates to `StoreHandle::write()`
- [ ] `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to `StoreHandle::delete()`
- [ ] Entity `changelog.rs` and `undo_stack.rs` deleted
- [ ] `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` dispatch through `StoreContext`
- [ ] `dispatch_command_internal` uses `store_context.flush_all()`
- [ ] Existing boards load without migration
- [ ] Do/undo/redo works end-to-end (manually verified)
- [ ] All existing tests green

## Tests
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -E 'rdeps(swissarmyhammer-entity)'` — all existing entity tests pass
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -E 'rdeps(swissarmyhammer-kanban)'` — all kanban tests pass (undo/redo integration)
- [ ] `cargo nextest run --workspace` — no regressions anywhere
- [ ] Manual: create task → undo → redo → verify
- [ ] Manual: edit field → undo → redo → verify
- [ ] Manual: delete task → undo → verify restored
- [ ] Manual: external file edit → UI updates
Migrate entity to TrackedStore — do/undo/redo, all tests green

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,74 +1,92 @@
 ## What

-Implement `TrackedStore<Item = Entity, ItemId = EntityId>` for the entity system. Replace entity's own changelog, undo stack, and flush logic with the store crate. Wire `StoreContext` into the dispatch layer. **Stop here and manually test do/undo/redo before proceeding.**
+Implement `TrackedStore` for each entity type (task, column, swimlane, tag, actor, board). One store per entity type directory. Replace entity's own changelog, undo stack, and flush logic with the store crate. Wire `StoreContext` into the dispatch layer. **Stop here and manually test do/undo/redo before proceeding.**
+
+**Key design:** One store per entity type, not one store for all entities. Each entity type has its own directory, serialization format (MD+YAML vs plain YAML), and ID format (ULID vs slug).

 **Files to modify:**
 - `swissarmyhammer-entity/Cargo.toml` — add dep on `swissarmyhammer-store`
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/lib.rs` — add `EntityId(Ulid)` newtype, export it
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/context.rs` — implement `TrackedStore`:
-  - `type Item = Entity`
-  - `type ItemId = EntityId`
-  - `root()` → entity_types directory
-  - `item_id(entity)` → `EntityId` from entity
-  - `serialize(entity)` → MD+YAML frontmatter text
-  - `deserialize(text)` → parse frontmatter+body into Entity
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/undo_commands.rs` — `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` dispatch through `StoreContext` instead of `EntityContext::undo()`
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/lib.rs` — add `EntityId(String)` newtype, export it
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/stores.rs` — (new) `TrackedStore` impls for each entity type, driven by `EntityDef`

-**Files to delete:**
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/undo_stack.rs` — moved to store crate
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/changelog.rs` — replaced by store crate
+**Per entity type, a TrackedStore impl that knows:**
+- `root()` → `.kanban/{type}s/` (e.g. `.kanban/tasks/`, `.kanban/columns/`)
+- `item_id()` → `EntityId(String)` — ULID for tasks, slug for columns/tags/actors
+- `serialize()` → MD+YAML if `EntityDef.body_field` is Some, plain YAML otherwise. Strips computed fields, applies defaults, deterministic field ordering for clean diffs.
+- `deserialize()` → parse frontmatter+body or plain YAML, inject ID from filename, flatten nested objects one level

-**Files to modify in kanban-app:**
-- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — replace `flush_and_emit_for_handle` with `store_context.flush_all()` + generic event emission loop
-- `kanban-app/src/state.rs` — `AppState` holds `StoreContext`, registers entity `StoreHandle` on board open
+**EntityId newtype:**
+```rust
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash)]
+pub struct EntityId(String);  // NOT Copy — slugs are strings
+// Display, FromStr — trivial delegation
+```

 **Approach:**

-### EntityId newtype
+### Store construction from EntityDef
+Rather than separate structs per type, one generic `EntityTypeStore` parameterized by `EntityDef`:
 ```rust
-#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash)]
-pub struct EntityId(ulid::Ulid);
-// Display, FromStr — delegate to Ulid
+pub struct EntityTypeStore {
+    root: PathBuf,
+    entity_def: Arc<EntityDef>,
+    field_defs: Arc<Vec<FieldDef>>,  // needed for computed field stripping + defaults
+}
+
+impl TrackedStore for EntityTypeStore {
+    type Item = Entity;
+    type ItemId = EntityId;
+    // serialize/deserialize dispatch on entity_def.body_field
+}
 ```

-### TrackedStore impl
-The serialize/deserialize methods must match the existing on-disk format exactly so existing boards load without migration:
-- `serialize`: YAML frontmatter between `---` delimiters + markdown body (if body_field is set)
-- `deserialize`: parse `---` delimiters, YAML frontmatter, markdown body
+This means one struct, constructed per entity type with different `EntityDef`s. Register one `StoreHandle<EntityTypeStore>` per entity type in `StoreContext`.

-### Migration path for EntityContext
-- `EntityContext` keeps its in-memory entity registry, field definitions, schema
-- Write path: `EntityContext::write()` delegates to `StoreHandle::write()` instead of doing its own file I/O + changelog
-- Delete path: `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to `StoreHandle::delete()`
-- Undo/redo: removed from EntityContext, handled by StoreContext
-- `push_undo_stack()`: removed, StoreHandle returns UndoEntryId, caller pushes to StoreContext
+### Migration path
+- `EntityContext::write()` delegates to the appropriate `StoreHandle` (looked up by entity type)
+- `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to `StoreHandle::delete()`
+- `EntityContext` keeps: in-memory entity registry, schema, validation engine, computed field derivation
+- Validation happens in `EntityContext` before calling `store.write()` — validation is above the store
+- Computed field stripping happens in `EntityTypeStore::serialize()` — it has access to `FieldDef`s to know which fields are computed
+- `push_undo_stack()` removed — `StoreHandle::write()` returns `UndoEntryId`, command layer pushes to `StoreContext`

 ### Dispatch layer changes
-- `dispatch_command_internal` gets access to `StoreContext` (on AppState)
+- `AppState` holds `StoreContext`
+- On board open: register one `StoreHandle<EntityTypeStore>` per entity type
 - After undoable commands: `store_context.flush_all()` replaces `flush_and_emit_for_handle()`
-- Emit each `ChangeEvent` from flush
 - `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` call `store_context.undo()`/`redo()`
-- UIState undo/redo flags synced from `store_context.can_undo()`/`can_redo()`

+### Changelog migration
+- Existing per-entity `.jsonl` changelogs are NOT migrated — they stay for backward compatibility / activity history
+- New store-level `changelog.jsonl` (one per entity type directory) is the undo source of truth going forward
+- Old undo_stack.yaml entries from before the migration won't match new UndoEntryIds — the stack starts fresh on first run after migration (acceptable — better than a complex migration)
+
+### Files to delete
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/undo_stack.rs` — moved to store crate
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/changelog.rs` — replaced by store crate (may keep for activity feed, but undo no longer uses it)
+
 ### Manual test checklist (do this before moving on)
-1. Open existing board — all entities load correctly
-2. Create a task — file appears on disk, changelog.jsonl entry logged
-3. Edit a task field — changelog entry with before/after text
-4. Cmd+Z — edit is undone, file reverts
+1. Open existing board — all entities load correctly (no format changes)
+2. Create a task — file on disk, new changelog.jsonl entry with before/after text
+3. Edit a task field — changelog entry with text diff
+4. Cmd+Z — edit is undone, file reverts to previous text
 5. Cmd+Shift+Z — edit is redone
-6. Delete a task — Cmd+Z restores it
-7. External file edit (e.g. vim) — flush detects change, UI updates
-8. Multiple undo/redo in sequence
-9. All existing tests pass
+6. Delete a task → Cmd+Z restores it from trash
+7. Edit a column name → Cmd+Z reverts (plain YAML entity)
+8. External file edit → flush detects change, UI updates
+9. Transaction: command that writes multiple entities → single Cmd+Z undoes all
+10. All existing tests pass

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `EntityId(Ulid)` newtype exported from entity crate
-- [ ] `TrackedStore<Item=Entity, ItemId=EntityId>` implemented
-- [ ] Entity serialize/deserialize matches existing on-disk format (no migration needed)
-- [ ] `EntityContext::write()` delegates to `StoreHandle::write()`
-- [ ] `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to `StoreHandle::delete()`
-- [ ] Entity `changelog.rs` and `undo_stack.rs` deleted
-- [ ] `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` dispatch through `StoreContext`
+- [ ] `EntityId(String)` newtype exported from entity crate
+- [ ] `EntityTypeStore` implements `TrackedStore<Item=Entity, ItemId=EntityId>`
+- [ ] One `StoreHandle<EntityTypeStore>` registered per entity type
+- [ ] Serialize matches existing on-disk format (MD+YAML / plain YAML)
+- [ ] Computed fields stripped in serialize
+- [ ] Deserialize handles both formats, injects ID from filename
+- [ ] `EntityContext::write()` delegates to StoreHandle
+- [ ] `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to StoreHandle
+- [ ] `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` dispatch through StoreContext
 - [ ] `dispatch_command_internal` uses `store_context.flush_all()`
 - [ ] Existing boards load without migration
 - [ ] Do/undo/redo works end-to-end (manually verified)
@@ -76,9 +94,6 @@

 ## Tests
 - [ ] `cargo nextest run -E 'rdeps(swissarmyhammer-entity)'` — all existing entity tests pass
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -E 'rdeps(swissarmyhammer-kanban)'` — all kanban tests pass (undo/redo integration)
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run --workspace` — no regressions anywhere
-- [ ] Manual: create task → undo → redo → verify
-- [ ] Manual: edit field → undo → redo → verify
-- [ ] Manual: delete task → undo → verify restored
-- [ ] Manual: external file edit → UI updates
\ No newline at end of file
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -E 'rdeps(swissarmyhammer-kanban)'` — all kanban tests pass
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run --workspace` — no regressions
+- [ ] Manual: full checklist above
\ No newline at end of file

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,99 +1,84 @@
 ## What

-Implement `TrackedStore` for each entity type (task, column, swimlane, tag, actor, board). One store per entity type directory. Replace entity's own changelog, undo stack, and flush logic with the store crate. Wire `StoreContext` into the dispatch layer. **Stop here and manually test do/undo/redo before proceeding.**
+Implement `TrackedStore<Item = Entity, ItemId = EntityId>` via an `EntityTypeStore` struct parameterized by `EntityDef` + `FieldDef`s. Prove the format round-trips perfectly against existing on-disk files. No wiring into EntityContext or dispatch — just the trait impl and tests.

-**Key design:** One store per entity type, not one store for all entities. Each entity type has its own directory, serialization format (MD+YAML vs plain YAML), and ID format (ULID vs slug).
+**Files to create:**
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/store.rs` — `EntityTypeStore` struct + `TrackedStore` impl

 **Files to modify:**
 - `swissarmyhammer-entity/Cargo.toml` — add dep on `swissarmyhammer-store`
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/lib.rs` — add `EntityId(String)` newtype, export it
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/stores.rs` — (new) `TrackedStore` impls for each entity type, driven by `EntityDef`
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/lib.rs` — add `EntityId(String)` newtype, export store module

-**Per entity type, a TrackedStore impl that knows:**
-- `root()` → `.kanban/{type}s/` (e.g. `.kanban/tasks/`, `.kanban/columns/`)
-- `item_id()` → `EntityId(String)` — ULID for tasks, slug for columns/tags/actors
-- `serialize()` → MD+YAML if `EntityDef.body_field` is Some, plain YAML otherwise. Strips computed fields, applies defaults, deterministic field ordering for clean diffs.
-- `deserialize()` → parse frontmatter+body or plain YAML, inject ID from filename, flatten nested objects one level
+**Approach:**

-**EntityId newtype:**
+### EntityId newtype
 ```rust
 #[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash)]
 pub struct EntityId(String);  // NOT Copy — slugs are strings
-// Display, FromStr — trivial delegation
 ```

-**Approach:**
-
-### Store construction from EntityDef
-Rather than separate structs per type, one generic `EntityTypeStore` parameterized by `EntityDef`:
+### EntityTypeStore
 ```rust
 pub struct EntityTypeStore {
     root: PathBuf,
     entity_def: Arc<EntityDef>,
-    field_defs: Arc<Vec<FieldDef>>,  // needed for computed field stripping + defaults
+    field_defs: Arc<Vec<FieldDef>>,
 }

 impl TrackedStore for EntityTypeStore {
     type Item = Entity;
     type ItemId = EntityId;
-    // serialize/deserialize dispatch on entity_def.body_field
+
+    fn root(&self) -> &Path { &self.root }
+    fn item_id(&self, entity: &Entity) -> EntityId { EntityId(entity.id.clone()) }
+    fn extension(&self) -> &str {
+        if self.entity_def.body_field.is_some() { "md" } else { "yaml" }
+    }
+    fn serialize(&self, entity: &Entity) -> Result<String> {
+        // Strip computed fields (check field_defs for computed flag)
+        // Apply field defaults for missing non-computed fields
+        // Deterministic field ordering (sorted by key) for clean diffs
+        // If body_field: MD+YAML frontmatter format
+        // If no body_field: plain YAML
+    }
+    fn deserialize(&self, id: &EntityId, text: &str) -> Result<Entity> {
+        // If body_field: parse frontmatter + body
+        // If no body_field: parse plain YAML
+        // Flatten nested objects one level deep
+        // Inject entity_type and id from constructor/filename
+    }
 }
 ```

-This means one struct, constructed per entity type with different `EntityDef`s. Register one `StoreHandle<EntityTypeStore>` per entity type in `StoreContext`.
-
-### Migration path
-- `EntityContext::write()` delegates to the appropriate `StoreHandle` (looked up by entity type)
-- `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to `StoreHandle::delete()`
-- `EntityContext` keeps: in-memory entity registry, schema, validation engine, computed field derivation
-- Validation happens in `EntityContext` before calling `store.write()` — validation is above the store
-- Computed field stripping happens in `EntityTypeStore::serialize()` — it has access to `FieldDef`s to know which fields are computed
-- `push_undo_stack()` removed — `StoreHandle::write()` returns `UndoEntryId`, command layer pushes to `StoreContext`
-
-### Dispatch layer changes
-- `AppState` holds `StoreContext`
-- On board open: register one `StoreHandle<EntityTypeStore>` per entity type
-- After undoable commands: `store_context.flush_all()` replaces `flush_and_emit_for_handle()`
-- `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` call `store_context.undo()`/`redo()`
-
-### Changelog migration
-- Existing per-entity `.jsonl` changelogs are NOT migrated — they stay for backward compatibility / activity history
-- New store-level `changelog.jsonl` (one per entity type directory) is the undo source of truth going forward
-- Old undo_stack.yaml entries from before the migration won't match new UndoEntryIds — the stack starts fresh on first run after migration (acceptable — better than a complex migration)
+### Key serialize details
+- Computed fields identified by checking `FieldDef` for a derive/compute marker
+- Field ordering: sort frontmatter keys alphabetically for deterministic output
+- Body field excluded from frontmatter, appended after `---` delimiter
+- Empty body: still include the `---` delimiter with empty body after it

-### Files to delete
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/undo_stack.rs` — moved to store crate
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/changelog.rs` — replaced by store crate (may keep for activity feed, but undo no longer uses it)
+### Key deserialize details
+- Split on `---` for MD+YAML format
+- Parse YAML frontmatter via `serde_yaml_ng`
+- Flatten nested objects: `{position: {column: "todo"}}` → `position_column: "todo"`
+- Inject `entity_type` from `EntityDef.name` and `id` from filename

-### Manual test checklist (do this before moving on)
-1. Open existing board — all entities load correctly (no format changes)
-2. Create a task — file on disk, new changelog.jsonl entry with before/after text
-3. Edit a task field — changelog entry with text diff
-4. Cmd+Z — edit is undone, file reverts to previous text
-5. Cmd+Shift+Z — edit is redone
-6. Delete a task → Cmd+Z restores it from trash
-7. Edit a column name → Cmd+Z reverts (plain YAML entity)
-8. External file edit → flush detects change, UI updates
-9. Transaction: command that writes multiple entities → single Cmd+Z undoes all
-10. All existing tests pass
+### Round-trip test strategy
+- Create entities programmatically, serialize, deserialize, compare
+- Read existing entity files from a test fixture, deserialize, re-serialize, compare text
+- Test both MD+YAML (task with body) and plain YAML (column, tag) formats
+- Test computed field stripping (field present in Entity but absent in serialized output)
+- Test field defaults (missing field gets default value on deserialize)
+- Test nested object flattening

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `EntityId(String)` newtype exported from entity crate
-- [ ] `EntityTypeStore` implements `TrackedStore<Item=Entity, ItemId=EntityId>`
-- [ ] One `StoreHandle<EntityTypeStore>` registered per entity type
-- [ ] Serialize matches existing on-disk format (MD+YAML / plain YAML)
-- [ ] Computed fields stripped in serialize
-- [ ] Deserialize handles both formats, injects ID from filename
-- [ ] `EntityContext::write()` delegates to StoreHandle
-- [ ] `EntityContext::delete()` delegates to StoreHandle
-- [ ] `UndoCmd`/`RedoCmd` dispatch through StoreContext
-- [ ] `dispatch_command_internal` uses `store_context.flush_all()`
-- [ ] Existing boards load without migration
-- [ ] Do/undo/redo works end-to-end (manually verified)
-- [ ] All existing tests green
+- [ ] `EntityId(String)` newtype exported
+- [ ] `EntityTypeStore` implements `TrackedStore`
+- [ ] Serialize matches existing on-disk format for tasks (MD+YAML)
+- [ ] Serialize matches existing on-disk format for columns/tags/etc (plain YAML)
+- [ ] Computed fields stripped during serialize

 ## What

-Implement `TrackedStore<Item = Entity, ItemId = EntityId>` via an `EntityTypeStore` struct parameterized by `EntityDef` + `FieldDef`s. Prove the format round-trips perfectly against existing on-disk files. No wiring into EntityContext or dispatch — just the trait impl and tests.

-**Files to create:**
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/store.rs` — `EntityTypeStore` struct + `TrackedStore` impl
+**Key design:** One store per entity type, not one store for all entities. Each entity type has its own directory, serialization format (MD+YAML vs plain YAML), and ID format (ULID vs slug).

 **Files to modify:**
 - `swissarmyhammer-entity/Cargo.toml` — add dep on `swissarmyhammer-store`
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/lib.rs` — add `EntityId(String)` newtype, export store module

+- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/stores.rs` — (new) `TrackedStore` impls for each entity type, driven by `EntityDef`

-**Approach:**
+**Per entity type, a TrackedStore impl that knows:**
+- `root()` → `.kanban/{type}s/` (e.g. `.kanban/tasks/`, `.kanban/columns/`)
+- `item_id()` → `EntityId(String)` — ULID for tasks, slug for columns/tags/actors
+- `serialize()` → MD+YAML if `EntityDef.body_field` is Some, plain YAML otherwise. Strips computed fields, applies defaults, deterministic field ordering for clean diffs.
+- `deserialize()` → parse frontmatter+body or plain YAML, inject ID from filename, flatten nested objects one level

-### EntityId newtype
+**EntityId newtype:**
 ```rust
 #[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash)]
 pub struct EntityId(String);  // NOT Copy — slugs are strings
+// Display, FromStr — trivial delegation
 ```

-### EntityTypeStore
+**Approach:**
+
+### Store construction from EntityDef
+Rather than separate structs per type, one generic `EntityTypeStore` parameterized by `EntityDef`:
 ```rust
 pub struct EntityTypeStore {
     root: PathBuf,
     entity_def: Arc<EntityDef>,
-    field_defs: Arc<Vec<FieldDef>>,
+    field_defs: Arc<Vec<FieldDef>>,  // needed for computed field stripping + defaults
 }

 impl TrackedStore for EntityTypeStore {
     type Item = Entity;
     type ItemId = EntityId;
-
-    fn root(&self) -> &Path { &self.root }
-    fn item_id(&self, entity: &Entity) -> EntityId { EntityId(entity.id.clone()) }
-    fn extension(&self) -> &str {
-        if self.entity_def.body_field.is_some() { "md" } else { "yaml" }
-    }
-    fn serialize(&self, entity: &Entity) -> Result<String> {
-        // Strip computed fields (check field_defs for computed flag)
-        // Apply field defaults for missing non-computed fields
-        // Deterministic field ordering (sorted by key) for clean diffs
-        // If body_field: MD+YAML frontmatter format
-        // If no body_field: plain YAML
-    }
-    fn deserialize(&self, id: &EntityId, text: &str) -> Result<Entity> {
-        // If body_field: parse frontmatter + body
-        // If no body_field: parse plain YAML
-        // Flatten nested objects one level deep
-        // Inject entity_type and id from constructor/filename
-    }
+    // serialize/deserialize dispatch on entity_def.body_field
 }
 ```

-### Key serialize details
-- Computed fields identified by checking `FieldDef` for a derive/compute marker
-- Field ordering: sort frontmatter keys alphabetically for deterministic output
-- Body field excluded from frontmatter, appended after `---` delimiter
-- Empty body: still include the `---` delimiter with empty body after it

+### Migration path
